name: Sourdough Pancakes #4
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the buttermilk pancake mix and 1/2 cup milk in a bowl.
2. Add the cooking oil and whisk until well mixed.
3. Beat in the large egg until incorporated.
4. Fold in 1/2 teaspoon baking powder.
5. Let the batter stand for a few moments to rest.
6. Cook drop-sized portions of the batter on a hot griddle or skillet, turning once.
7. Add berries of your choice before flipping if desired.
